name: Reuben Quiche in Pastry Crust
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Prick the crust and bake for 7 minutes.
3. Fill the pie shell with corned beef, sauerkraut, and cheese.
4. Mix the remaining ingredients (eggs, cream, onion, mustard) in a separate bowl.
5. Pour the mixture into the pie shell.
6. Bake for 40 minutes.
7. Allow to stand for 5 minutes before cutting.
